title: Smoky Egyptian Bean Stew
description: A flavorful and nutritious keto-friendly stew made with smoky beans, mildly seasoned with spices.

ingredients.name: Mildly spiced Egyptian stew spice blend

instructions: In a large pot, heat the avocado oil over medium heat.
Add the minced black garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the smoky black beans, Egyptian stew spice blend, black pepper, and salt. Stir well to combine.
Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the flavors have melded together.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
